problem id: 8ad0116e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5)

examples:
  11011000 -> 00011011
  01100011 -> 01101100
  11110100 -> 10011110
  01101010 -> 01001101
  11111110 -> 11011111
  01100101 -> 10101100
  11110111 -> 11111110
  00001111 -> 11100001
  10110011 -> 01110110

query: 00100010
predicted answer: 01000100
